categories.name: IT'S NOT GOOD TO BE THE KING

Not a Dirty Harry movie, magnus force makes soccer balls curve due to this resistant force acting on 1 side of the spinning sphere

7,300 square miles in area, it's the smallest of the Great Lakes

questions.clue: You could say T.S. Eliot's masterpiece known as "The Four" these gives you quadruple the number

final.clue: Damage from Hurricane Matthew in this city in 2016 revealed a plot of colonist graves from perhaps as long as 430 years ago
